success_factors: Workflow reached terminal success state and executed all expected nodes: download, analysis, env, generate, run, review, finalize.
Import-mode adapter strategy matched repository characteristics (Python package with identifiable namespaces under src/pyPDAF).
Generated MCP service started healthy over stdio, indicating baseline runtime viability.
Low intrusiveness risk and medium complexity profile reduced integration friction.
failure_reasons: Functional completeness gap: generated MCP plugin reports zero concrete tool endpoints despite successful startup.
Validation quality gap: original project tests are marked failed/empty with inconsistent metadata (100% coverage with no test execution), reducing confidence.
Observability/data quality gap: performance/resource metrics and per-node timings were not captured; DeepWiki analysis failed.

node_performance.download_time: Completed within total runtime (270.22s), repository imported via zip fallback successfully; exact node timing unavailable.
node_performance.analysis_time: Static/package analysis completed with medium-risk profile and import feasibility 0.72; exact duration unavailable.
node_performance.generation_time: Scaffold files were generated successfully (7 files), but endpoint generation appears incomplete (0 endpoints/tools exposed).
node_performance.test_time: MCP health test passed quickly (startup_time reported 0), while original project test validation is effectively non-executed/invalid.

resource_usage.memory_efficiency: Unknown due to missing telemetry (reported 0 MB likely placeholder).
resource_usage.cpu_efficiency: Unknown due to missing telemetry (reported 0% likely placeholder).
